System Architecture Modules

⚙️
1

Core Compiler

Rust-based HTML AST renderer

🎨
2

Token Engine

Dynamic palette & typography system

📏
3

Layout Guard

Strict 420x525 aspect boundary

4

Dataviz Engine

Native SVG path & bar generator

📤
5

Export Pipeline

Headless PNG & PDF rasterizer

🔌
6

MCP Server

Model Context Protocol interface

SLIDEFORGE SYSTEM AUDIT

⚙️
1

Core Compiler

Token Engine

MCP Server

slideforge.dev #rust #slides

Enterprise Feature Specification

Advanced Predictive Analytics

Real-time stream processing and high-dimensional predictive modeling engine designed to convert unstructured telemetry into actionable operational intelligence.

Military-Grade Security Suite

Multi-region key management, fine-grained role-based access control, cryptographic audit trails, and automated vulnerability scanning across all tiers.

🤝

Real-Time Collaboration Mesh

Operational Transformation (OT) powered multi-cursor editing, presence tracking, and contextual commenting for globally distributed engineering teams.

Unified API Gateway

High-capacity RESTful and GraphQL endpoints featuring automatic rate limiting, payload validation, token bucket throttling, and edge caching.

SLIDEFORGE SYSTEM AUDIT
slideforge.dev #rust #slides

Enterprise Feature Specification

Advanced Predictive Analytics

Real-time stream processing and high-dimensional predictive modeling engine designed to convert unstructured telemetry into actionable operational intelligence.

Military-Grade Security Suite

Multi-region key management, fine-grained role-based access control, cryptographic audit trails, and automated vulnerability scanning across all tiers.

🤝

Real-Time Collaboration Mesh

Operational Transformation (OT) powered multi-cursor editing, presence tracking, and contextual commenting for globally distributed engineering teams.

Unified API Gateway

High-capacity RESTful and GraphQL endpoints featuring automatic rate limiting, payload validation, token bucket throttling, and edge caching.

SLIDEFORGE SYSTEM AUDIT
slideforge.dev #rust #slides

Myth vs Fact

Breakfast is the most critical meal for weight management.
MYTH
FACT
Clinical trials show no statistically significant difference in weight loss between breakfast eaters and skippers.
Meta-analyses demonstrate total daily caloric deficit and macronutrient distribution determine weight outcomes, regardless of breakfast intake timing.
SLIDEFORGE SYSTEM AUDIT

3-Step Carousel Creation

01
Define Tokens
Set brand primary color & fonts
02
Compile Specs
Generate slide HTML AST
03
Export Media
Render PNG/PDF assets

Automated 3-step compilation pipeline converting raw JSON specifications into production-ready carousel assets.

Dual Core Pillars

Performance Engine

Native Rust binary compiled with zero overhead.

Design Guard

Strict validator catches visual regressions automatically.

Native Rust Compilation

100% high throughput slide rendering engine.

SLIDEFORGE SYSTEM AUDIT
slideforge.dev #rust #slides

Dual Core Pillars

Performance Engine

Native Rust binary compiled with zero overhead.

Design Guard

Strict validator catches visual regressions automatically.

Native Rust Compilation

100% high throughput slide rendering engine.

SLIDEFORGE SYSTEM AUDIT
slideforge.dev #rust #slides
CORE DEFINITION

Slide Composition Engine

/slīd kəm-pə-zi-shən/

A deterministic layout synthesizer that converts structured JSON specs into pixel-perfect presentation slides under strict aspect constraints.

Static templates are replaced by dynamic layout engines that scale typography and enforce mathematical spacing rules at runtime.

SLIDEFORGE SYSTEM AUDIT
slideforge.dev #rust #slides
CORE DEFINITION

Slide Composition Engine

/slīd kəm-pə-zi-shən/

A deterministic layout synthesizer that converts structured JSON specs into pixel-perfect presentation slides under strict aspect constraints.

Static templates are replaced by dynamic layout engines that scale typography and enforce mathematical spacing rules at runtime.

SLIDEFORGE SYSTEM AUDIT
slideforge.dev #rust #slides
💡
💡
info

Critical Architecture Note

Always validate layout bounds before exporting production PNG assets to guarantee zero visual regressions.

SLIDEFORGE SYSTEM AUDIT
slideforge.dev #rust #slides
💡
💡
info

Critical Architecture Note

Always validate layout bounds before exporting production PNG assets to guarantee zero visual regressions.

SLIDEFORGE SYSTEM AUDIT
slideforge.dev #rust #slides

Frequently Asked Questions

Q1

Is SlideForge open source?

Yes, SlideForge is built in Rust under the MIT license.

Q2

Can I export to PDF & PNG?

Yes, PDF and PNG rasterization are supported natively.

Q3

How fast is slide compilation?

SlideForge compiles a 10-slide carousel in under 10ms.

Q4

Does it support custom themes?

Yes, design tokens and color palettes are fully configurable.

SLIDEFORGE SYSTEM AUDIT
slideforge.dev #rust #slides

Frequently Asked Questions

Q1

Is SlideForge open source?

Yes, SlideForge is built in Rust under the MIT license.

Q2

Can I export to PDF & PNG?

Yes, PDF and PNG rasterization are supported natively.

Q3

How fast is slide compilation?

SlideForge compiles a 10-slide carousel in under 10ms.

Q4

Does it support custom themes?

Yes, design tokens and color palettes are fully configurable.
